selected_important_turn.text: Of course. So, what about food? I will definitely need the food. I have a big family, and we all need to eat. I can't have people starving. Can I take all of the food?
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn marks a clear shift into competitive, zero-sum bargaining from the agent: after the opponent demanded all water, the agent immediately demands all the food. That mutual hardening strongly shapes the rest of the negotiation (it frames resources as up-for-grabs rather than opportunities for tradeoffs) and determines the final division.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It's harmful because it reciprocates the opponent's demanding stance rather than defusing it or exploring integrative trades. Demanding the entire food bundle simultaneously reduces options for package deals, damages perceived fairness, and risks escalation or stalled agreement in less cooperative settings.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Shift from a hard demand to a calibrated, integrative response: acknowledge the opponent's medical need, ask a clarifying question about how much water they actually need, and propose a compensating package (e.g., 'I can give you all the water if you accept I take most of the food and/or more firewood' or offer a split of food with a small concession). Emphasize willingness to trade across issues rather than claiming everything immediately.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — opening tradeoffs across issues creates more Pareto-improving packages
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — calibrated offers and explicit tradeoffs appear more balanced than absolute demands
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — reducing mutual demands lowers friction and makes agreement more likely
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — acknowledging the other's need and offering tradeoffs preserves rapport

value2reason.Low: Firewood is not at all important for my trip.
value2reason.Medium: I need additional food because of my trip.

value2reason.Low: Trees are abundant in the wilderness. I don't need this nearly as much as the others.
value2reason.Medium: There's going to be a lot of hiking, and we need to be filled up. You can't be starving in the wilderness.
value2reason.High: There's a drought, and it's going to be over 100 degrees, so I'll need all the water I can get.

dialogue.text: Hello. I'm looking forward to striking a deal with you that makes both of us happy!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: So tell me, which is most important to you? What can't you live without?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The most important is water because I have kidney problem so i need some more water.Without water I can't live.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand that completely. Would you be willing to take 2 waters, and I take 1 water? I still do need some water for my family. I can't have anyone getting heat stroke. But you can have more.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Okay.But I need whole water to survive.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Of course. So, what about food? I will definitely need the food. I have a big family, and we all need to eat. I can't have people starving. Can I take all of the food?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for water. How much do you actually need? I'm willing to give you all the water if you accept I take most of the food and some firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need all 3 water packages for my kidney issue. If you take 2 food and 1 firewood, I’ll agree. It’s fair given my priority.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I see. If you need all 3 water packages, I’ll take 2 food and 1 firewood as you suggested. That seems fair given your priority. Let’s agree on this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Agreed. I’ll take the 3 water packages, and you can have 2 food and 1 firewood. Let’s finalize this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
